mechanics.excerpt: SKILLS Military This subskill represents the various fighting arts taught by organized militaries and police_ It borrows from many martial arts styles and concentrates extreme offense and little finesse, with the goa of removing a opponent quickly by any means possible Haymaker (Attack): By taking Fatigue, you may add 206 damage.
